attacking_style: Sprint finisher who capitalizes on caught breakaways, timing final acceleration precisely within the last 200m when earlier launchers fade.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns; appears capable of positioning independently for sprint finishes.
terrain_preference: Stages ending in sprints from caught breakaways where tactical patience can overcome pure power; benefits when pure sprinters are absent or competitors hesitate.
vulnerability: Insufficient observations to identify specific weaknesses, though reliance on tactical timing suggests vulnerability against pure power sprinters in clean mass sprints.

form_trajectory: positive: achieved Peter Slam milestone with tactical maturity evident in sprint timing execution
